latin: Dux rebellium, cum exercitus eius fugere vellet, in equo ante aciem stetit et clamavit: 'vitam nobis auferre possunt — sed libertatem nostram numquam auferent!'

questions.prompt: What did the rebel leader's army want to do?
What does the leader say cannot be taken from them?

translation: The leader of the rebels, when his army wanted to flee, stood on horseback before the battle line and shouted: 'They can take our lives — but they will never take our freedom!'
